issue: Hi, please pause our subscription. We have stopped all hiring efforts for now.
subject: Subscription pause
response: To pause your subscription, follow these steps: Access your Subscription Settings by clicking on the profile icon and selecting Settings. Navigate to the Billing section under Subscription, then click the Cancel Plan button. Select the desired pause duration (between 1-12 months) and click Confirm Pause. Please note that you must have an active subscription that started at least 30 days ago and have a monthly subscription for an eligible plan.
justification: The provided corpus excerpts contain step-by-step instructions for pausing a subscription, including prerequisites and the process for extending the pause period.

issue: Hello, I have completed an assessment, but my name is incorrect on the certificate. Can you please update it
subject: Certificate name update
response: You can update the name on your certificate only once per account. To do so, open your certificate page, enter the name you want to display in the Full Name field, click Regenerate Certificate, and then click Update Name in the confirmation dialog. Alternatively, for name corrections, you can contact HackerRank support with proof of your correct name, such as a government ID.
justification: The user's issue is related to updating their name on a certificate, which is addressed in the provided corpus excerpts, specifically in sections [1] and [3].

issue: I want Claude to stop crawling by website

response: To block Claude from crawling your entire website, add the following to your robots.txt file: User-agent: ClaudeBot Disallow: /. Please do this for every subdomain you wish to opt out from.
justification: The corpus excerpts provide instructions on how to block Claude's crawler using the robots.txt file.

issue: i am in US Virgin Islands and the merchant is saying i have to spend minimum 10$ on my VISA card, why so?
subject: Visa card minimum spend
response: In the US Virgin Islands, merchants are allowed to set a minimum transaction amount of up to $10 for Visa credit card purchases under the Dodd-Frank Act. However, this exception only applies to credit cards, not debit cards. If you're using a debit card, the merchant should not require a minimum amount.
justification: The provided information is based on excerpts [1] and [3], which explain the minimum transaction amount rules for Visa cards in the US and its territories, including the US Virgin Islands.
